Core Features

Everything you need to dominate focus

MindFokas is a precision-built focus training system. No fluff — just real tools to build concentration, discipline, and deep work habits.

⏱️
Focus Timer
Custom Pomodoro-style timers with flexible session lengths. Choose 15 min sprints or full 2-hour deep work blocks. The timer is your weapon.
Core Engine
🏙️
City Builder
Every completed focus session builds your personal city. Watch your skyline grow with each session. Miss a day and your buildings stop growing — pure accountability.
Gamified Progress
🧠
Mind Score
Your personal MindFokas Score tracks consistency, session quality, and streaks into one powerful number out of 100. Know exactly where you stand.
AI Analytics
🔥
Streak System
Daily streak tracking ignites your competitive drive. Build consecutive days, protect your flame, and unlock warrior ranks as you level up your consistency.
Habit Engine
🎵
Ambient Sounds
Deep focus playlists — rain, lo-fi, white noise, and custom soundscapes. Set the environment. Block the noise. Enter the zone on command.
Focus Environment
🏆
Achievement Badges
Unlock badges from Beginner (10 hrs) all the way to Master of Focus (1000 hrs). Six tiers of achievement. One ultimate goal. Become the warrior.
Achievements

App Preview

A command centre for your mind

Precision UI built for warriors who don't have time for bloated apps. Clean, fast, powerful.

Live Session Timer Real-time countdown with visual ring progress. See exactly how much fight is left in each session.
XP & Level System Earn XP every session and level up your Focus Warrior rank. Progression you can actually see.
Stats at a Glance Today's focus hours, total sessions, and weekly streak — all on one clean dashboard.
Your Growing City Each session adds to your skyline. Your city is a visual map of every minute you conquered.

Achievement System

Earn your warrior rank

Six tiers of achievement. Each one harder to earn. All of them worth it. Where will you stop?

Beginner
10 hrs · Tier I
Focus Explorer
50 hrs · Tier II
Discipline Builder
100 hrs · Tier III
Focus Warrior

Elite Warrior

Master of Focus

How It Works

Simple to start.
Hard to master.

Four steps to transform how you work.

01
Download & Sign Up
Get MindFokas free on iOS or Android. Create your Focus Warrior profile in under a minute. No credit card, no commitment.
02
Set Your Session
Choose your timer length — 15 minutes to 2 hours. Pick an ambient soundscape. Hit start. That's it.
03
Build Your City
Every completed session adds a building to your personal skyline. Your city grows only when you do. Skip a session, skip a floor.
04
Earn Your Rank
Accumulate hours, grow your Mind Score, climb from Beginner to Master of Focus. Your rank is a direct reflection of your discipline.

Ready to become a Focus Warrior?

Join warriors who are already building their cities, training their minds, and dominating their focus. Download free today.

Privacy Terms Support Contact
🔒
Privacy Policy
Last updated · May 2026
Information We Collect

MindFokas collects minimal data to power your experience. This includes your display name, focus session history, streak data, achievement progress, and app preferences stored locally on your device.

If you choose to create an account, we may collect your phone number or email address solely for authentication purposes. We do not collect any personal data beyond what is necessary to run the app.

How We Use Your Data

Your data is used exclusively to provide and improve the MindFokas experience — powering your Mind Score, tracking your city builds, calculating your streak, and unlocking achievements. We do not use your data for advertising.

Data Storage & Security

Focus session data is stored locally on your device. Where cloud sync is enabled, data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never sell your personal information to third parties under any circumstances.

Third-Party Services

MindFokas may use industry-standard analytics tools to understand app performance and crash reports. These tools do not have access to your personal focus data or session history.

Your Rights

You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal data at any time. To exercise these rights or for any privacy-related questions, contact us at:

✉️
Privacy Enquiries
mindfokas@gmail.com
Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes via the app or email. Continued use of MindFokas after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

📋
Terms of Service
Effective · May 2026
Acceptance of Terms

By downloading or using MindFokas, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the application.

Use of the App

MindFokas is a personal focus and productivity tool. You agree to use it only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe the rights of others. You must be at least 13 years of age to use this application.

User Accounts

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorised use of your account. MindFokas is not liable for any loss resulting from unauthorised account access.

Intellectual Property

All content within MindFokas — including the logo, design, code, gamification systems, city builder mechanics, and achievement framework — is the exclusive property of MindFokas and protected by applicable intellectual property laws.

Limitation of Liability

MindFokas is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the app, including loss of focus data or session history.

Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to MindFokas at our discretion if you violate these terms. You may also delete your account at any time through the app settings.

Contact

For any terms-related questions:

✉️
Legal Enquiries
mindfokas@gmail.com

Support

How Can We Help?

Timer Issues

City Builder

🔥
Streak & XP

🏆

🔔
Notifications
Session reminders or break alerts not working as expected.
👤
Account

Contact Support

Can't find a solution? Reach out directly — we typically respond within 24 hours.

✉️
Support Email
mindfokas@gmail.com
Response within 24 hours · Mon – Sat
✉️
Contact Us
Get in touch with the team
Reach Out

Whether you have a question, feedback, a feature request, or just want to say hello — we'd love to hear from you. Every message is read by a real human.

Email
📧
General & All Enquiries
mindfokas@gmail.com
We reply within 24 hrs · Mon – Sat
What to Include

To help us help you faster, please include:

◆ Your device type and operating system version
◆ A brief description of the issue or feedback
◆ Screenshots if relevant — they speed up resolution significantly
◆ Your MindFokas username or registered email
Response Time

We aim to respond to all messages within 24 hours on business days. For urgent issues, mark your subject line with [URGENT] and we'll prioritise your message.
